_description: Banned packages by ecosystem. Checked by dep-guard.sh (install-time) and composure shared-dependencies.json (write-time).

axios.reason: 9+ CVEs (SSRF, credential leakage, DoS). State-sponsored supply chain compromise 2026-03-31 injected RAT via hijacked maintainer account.

request.reason: Deprecated since February 2020. Unmaintained with multiple unpatched vulnerabilities. 11+ known CVEs.

event-stream.reason: Supply chain attack (2018). Malicious flatmap-stream dependency stole cryptocurrency wallet keys. Package abandoned.

colors.reason: Maintainer sabotage (2022). Intentionally injected infinite loop into v1.4.1+. Governance failure demonstrates supply chain risk.

faker.reason: Maintainer sabotage (2022). Same author as colors. Intentionally corrupted. Community fork available.

node-uuid.reason: Deprecated. Renamed to 'uuid'. No longer maintained under this name. Native crypto.randomUUID() available in Node 19+.

moment.reason: Deprecated by maintainers (September 2020). 300KB+ with no tree-shaking support. Known ReDoS vulnerabilities in older versions.

querystring.reason: Prototype pollution vulnerability. Node.js built-in querystring is deprecated in favor of URLSearchParams.

pycrypto.reason: Unmaintained since 2014. Heap-based buffer overflow and other vulnerabilities. Use actively maintained alternatives.

python-jwt.reason: Authentication bypass vulnerabilities. Confusingly named — not the same as PyJWT. Has allowed forged tokens.

pyyaml-unsafe.reason: yaml.load() without SafeLoader enables arbitrary code execution. This is a usage pattern issue — always use yaml.safe_load().

django-debug-toolbar.reason: SQL injection in older versions. Must never be enabled in production. Ensure DEBUG=False gating.

openssl.reason: Wrapper around C OpenSSL library inherits its CVE surface. Consider pure-Rust alternatives for new projects.

github.com/dgrijalva/jwt-go.reason: Unmaintained. Forked to golang-jwt/jwt. Known vulnerabilities in token validation.
